title: Alessandro Scotti
text: Home * People * Alessandro Scotti Ubaldo Andrea Farina and Alessandro Scotti [1] Alessandro Scotti , an Italian software developer and computer chess programmer. He is author of the chess engines Kiwi [2] and Hamsters [3] . Alessandro also tinkered with the WinBoard source code, and was able to add a few new features to it [4] .
